name: Checks Cashed
description_short: This is an Exxon gas station location in Memphis, TN offering convenience store services and fuel rewards—not a check-cashing business.
description_long: This listing appears to be a data entry error. The URL points to an Exxon/Mobil branded gas station located at 3946 Rhodes Avenue in Memphis, Tennessee, operating 24 hours daily. The station is part of the ExxonMobil network and functions as a standard fuel and convenience retail location. The website content shows standard gas station amenities including a convenience store, fuel pumps, and loyalty program integration. There is no evidence of check-cashing services, money order issuance, wire transfer capabilities, or bill payment services on this station's profile. The company offers fuel sales, in-store convenience items, and access to the Exxon Mobil Rewards+ loyalty program. This location distinguishes itself by 24/7 operation in an urban Memphis location with commercial diesel fleet card acceptance. The primary caveat is that this company entry is fundamentally miscategorized—it is a petroleum/convenience retail location, not a financial services provider offering check-cashing or related services.
pros: Open 24 hours daily for fuel and convenience purchases
Accepts commercial diesel fleet cards for business customers
Exxon Mobil Rewards+ loyalty program with points earning on fuel and in-store purchases
Located in accessible Memphis location with phone support (901-417-7987)
Accepts Walmart+ integration for customer benefits
Multiple nearby competitor stations listed for consumer comparison
cons: No check-cashing, money order, wire transfer, or bill payment services offered
This is a gas station, not a financial services provider—fundamental category mismatch
Limited to fuel and convenience retail offerings only
best_for: Drivers needing 24/7 fuel access in Memphis
Commercial fleet operators with diesel requirements
Exxon Mobil Rewards members seeking point accumulation
diagnosis: This entry is incorrectly categorized as check-cashing. It is an Exxon gas station offering fuel and convenience services, not financial services. This company does not offer check-cashing, money orders, wire transfers, or bill payment services and should not appear in consumer finance profiles for those services.
services: Exxon Mobil Rewards+ program enrollment and points earning
